items.title: Constellation Energy Shows Why Reliable Power Is Overtaking Oil in Market Value
items.author: Jeffrey Neal Johnson
items.description: Bank of America recommends buying Constellation Energy, highlighting a strategic shift in energy investment from traditional oil and gas towards reliable electricity providers, particularly those supporting the AI revolution's power needs.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Strong growth potential due to nuclear power infrastructure, federal tax credit stability, strategic positioning for AI data center power demands, and planned acquisition of Calpine Corporation
Mentioned as a key partner in a 20-year power purchase agreement for the Crane Clean Energy Center restart

items.title: 3 Unstoppable Vanguard ETFs to Buy Even if There's a Stock Market Sell-Off in 2026
items.author: Daniel Foelber
items.description: The article discusses three Vanguard ETFs that could be resilient during a potential stock market sell-off in 2026: S&P 500 Growth ETF, Information Technology ETF, and Dividend Appreciation ETF. These funds offer diversification and growth potential across top technology and dividend-increasing companies.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Highlighted as a key holding in multiple ETFs and considered a market leader in technology and AI

items.title: Palantir Is Being Valued as AI Infrastructure, Not a Short-Cycle Software Story
items.author: Itai Smidt
items.description: Palantir is being evaluated as a critical AI infrastructure company with strong government and commercial potential, driven by its advanced data processing platforms and impressive growth metrics in AI-enabled workflows.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Strong revenue growth (47.23%), expanding commercial segment (121% growth), deep government contracts, high gross margins (80.81%), and strategic positioning in AI infrastructure with multi-year, mission-critical deployments

items.title: 1 Vanguard ETF I'm Buying in 2026 and Holding Forever
items.author: David Dierking
items.description: The article recommends the Vanguard Total Stock Market ETF (VTI) as an ideal long-term investment due to its broad diversification across 3,500 U.S. stocks, ultra-low expense ratio, and balanced exposure to large, mid, and small-cap stocks.

items.title: Is It Time to Load Up on This Dividend King Poised to Join the $1 Trillion Club in 2026?
items.author: Stefon Walters
items.description: Walmart is on track to potentially join the trillion-dollar market cap club in 2026, driven by strong e-commerce growth, innovative advertising revenue, and strategic use of its physical stores as delivery hubs.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The article highlights Walmart's impressive stock performance (up 29% year-to-date), strong e-commerce growth (28% U.S., 27% global), rapidly growing advertising business (53% global growth), and potential to reach trillion-dollar market cap in 2026
Mentioned as Walmart's e-commerce competitor, with Walmart now closing the delivery convenience gap
Briefly mentioned in context of stock valuation comparisons
